parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "company_id": "{{ $json.company_id }}",
  "contact_id": "{{ $json.contact_id }}",
  "agent_run_id": "{{ $json.agent_run_id }}",
  "bland_call_id": "{{ $json.call_id }}",
  "status": "{{ $json.status }}",
  "duration_seconds": {{ $json.call_length || 0 }},
  "transcript": {{ JSON.stringify($json.transcript || '') }},
  "summary": {{ JSON.stringify($json.summary || '') }},
  "recording_url": {{ JSON.stringify($json.recording_url || '') }},
  "metadata": {{ JSON.stringify({ ai_intent_analysis: $json.ai_analysis, agent_type: $json.agent_type, price: $json.price }) }}
}
